query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT worker_id) as unique_workers,
       MIN(work_date) as earliest_date,
       MAX(work_date) as latest_date
FROM worker_daily_finance;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT worker_id) as unique_workers,
       MIN(work_date) as earliest_date,
       MAX(work_date) as latest_date
FROM worker_daily_finance;
